subject: Swift Trigger 1213872 is not an astrophysical event
body:
M. J. Moss (GSFC), K. L. Page (U Leicester), B. Sbarufatti (INAF-OAB)
and M. A. Williams (PSU) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift-BAT trigger 1213872 is also related to the ongoing star tracker loss-of-lock event, and is not astrophysically of interest.
